name: Productivity
description: Your AI-powered daily driver. Email management, calendar scheduling, task tracking, and note-taking all wired into one cohesive workflow.
quickstart:
1. Install the Productivity config:
```bash
openclaw config install productivity
```

2. Authenticate Google Workspace:
```bash
gog auth login
```

3. Set your Obsidian vault path in `openclaw.json`:
```json
{
  "skills": ["gog", "apple-notes", "apple-reminders", "obsidian"],
  "config": {
    "obsidian": {
      "vaultPath": "~/Documents/ObsidianVault"
    }
  }
}
```

4. Start your agent:
```bash
openclaw start
```

name: Content Creator
description: Write, polish, and publish content that sounds human. Blog posts, social media, newsletters — with built-in humanization and video transcript extraction.
quickstart:
1. Install the Content Creator config:
```bash
openclaw config install content-creator
```

2. Install video tools:
```bash
brew install yt-dlp ffmpeg
```

3. Get a Brave Search API key from https://brave.com/search/api/

4. Configure:
```json
{
  "skills": ["humanizer", "video-transcript-downloader", "web-search", "obsidian"],
  "env": {
    "BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY": "your_key"
  }
}
```

5. Start creating:
```bash
openclaw start
```

name: Researcher
description: Deep research and knowledge synthesis. Web search, content extraction, note-taking, and context engineering for thorough investigation of any topic.
quickstart:
1. Install the Researcher config:
```bash
openclaw config install researcher
```

2. Set up search:
```bash
export BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY=your_key
```

3. Configure:
```json
{
  "skills": ["web-search", "context-engineering", "obsidian", "video-transcript-downloader"],
  "config": {
    "obsidian": {
      "vaultPath": "~/Documents/Research"
    }
  }
}
```

4. Start researching:
```bash
openclaw start
```

name: Builder
description: Ship code faster. GitHub integration, context-aware development, code review, and CI monitoring for developers who want an AI pair programmer.
quickstart:
1. Install the Builder config:
```bash
openclaw config install builder
```

2. Authenticate GitHub:
```bash
gh auth login
```

3. Configure:
```json
{
  "skills": ["github", "context-engineering", "web-search", "discord"],
  "env": {
    "GITHUB_TOKEN": "your_token"
  }
}
```

4. Start building:
```bash
openclaw start
```
